languages.text: {n}В черепной коробке покоятся лишь управляющий микрокогитатор, соответствующий имперским стандартам набор манипуляторов и самописец, фиксирующий логи. Органические компоненты полностью отсутствуют.{/n}
{n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В черепной коробке покоятся лишь управляющий микрокогитатор, соответствующий имперским стандартам набор манипуляторов и самописец, фиксирующий логи. Органические компоненты полностью отсутствуют.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}
{n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}
{n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El cráneo solo contiene un microcogitador de control, un conjunto de manipuladores estándar del Imperium y una autopluma para los registros. Carece por completo de componentes orgánicos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El cráneo solo contiene un microcogitador de control, un conjunto de manipuladores estándar del Imperium y una autopluma para los registros. Carece por completo de componentes orgánicos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}头骨里只装了一个微型控制沉思者、一套帝国标准的调制器，以及一个用于记录日志的自动羽毛笔。其内部完全不存在任何有机组件。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}头骨里只装了一个微型控制沉思者、一套帝国标准的调制器，以及一个用于记录日志的自动羽毛笔。其内部完全不存在任何有机组件。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sur le crâne, vous ne distinguez qu'un microcogitateur, un ensemble de manipulateurs standardisés de l'Imperium et une autoplume. Il n'y a aucun composant organique.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sur le crâne, vous ne distinguez qu'un microcogitateur, un ensemble de manipulateurs standardisés de l'Imperium et une autoplume. Il n'y a aucun composant organique.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kafatası; bir kontrol mikrokavramsayarı, İmparatorluk standartlarında bir çevirteç seti ve kayıt tutmada kullanılan bir otoyazar içeriyor. Organik bileşenlerin hiçbiri yok.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kafatası; bir kontrol mikrokavramsayarı, İmparatorluk standartlarında bir çevirteç seti ve kayıt tutmada kullanılan bir otoyazar içeriyor. Organik bileşenlerin hiçbiri yok.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Schädel enthält lediglich einen Mikrocogitator als Steuerung, einen Satz imperiale Manipulatoren und eine Autofeder für Protokollierungszwecke. Es gibt keinerlei organische Komponenten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}

traits.locale_text: Der Schädel enthält lediglich einen Mikrocogitator als Steuerung, einen Satz imperiale Manipulatoren und eine Autofeder für Protokollierungszwecke. Es gibt keinerlei organische Komponenten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}頭蓋骨にはコントロール用のマイクロコギテーターと、インペリウム標準のマニピュレーター一式、そしてログを記録するためのオートクィルのみが入っている。すべての有機的なコンポーネントは完全に欠落している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The skull contains only a control micro-cogitator, an Imperium-standard set of manipulators, and an autoquill for log-keeping. All organic components are completely absent.{/n}
